'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 108''' is the one hundred eighth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[March 19]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Star Terror!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[Star Terror!]]"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Heroes of the galaxy Part 3"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 18: Homo-Ascendant?"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Who shall live? Who shall die?"
